message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate _winapi, _ctypes, _sqlite3 to factory pattern

Phase 5 DRY consolidation - replaced 40+ generator functions with
single-line factory calls using h.c(), h.I64(), h.I32(), h.err().

Changes:
- _winapi_mod.zig: 391→84 lines (-307 lines)
- _ctypes_mod.zig: 286→63 lines (-223 lines)
- _sqlite3_mod.zig: 256→73 lines (-183 lines)
- Fixed posix.kill error handling in test_commands.zig

Total: ~714 lines saved
